plus.analyst_notes:
Closes https://github.com/vz-risk/VCDB/issues/23571
Encoded by AI — encode-veris-incident skill version 20260713T202114Z

Sources consulted: Cyber Daily (https://www.cyberdaily.au/security/13784-exclusive-victorian-rv-dealer-suffers-alleged-cyber-attack); ransomware.live listing (https://ransomware.live/id/U291dGhlcm4gZGVzaWduIFJWQGNtZG9yZ2FuaXphdGlvbg==).

No incident date provided in sources. CMD Organization listed Southern Design RV on their site on 2026-06-20 (per ransomware.live). The article was published 2026-06-22. Using June 2026 as the approximate incident date (earliest known date of claim/discovery). Initial access method not specified; coded as Unknown hacking. Southern Design RV declined to comment; attack not confirmed by victim.

Extortion: CMD Organization set up a public data auction starting at 5 bitcoin. This constitutes an extortion demand (data will be sold/published unless ransom paid). Coded action.social.variety Extortion. Social vector coded as Web application (dark web auction/leak site). Per VCDB rules, Alter behavior coded in attribute.integrity and P - Unknown added as People asset.

Data: Cyber Daily describes a data sample with customer names, addresses, emails, phone numbers, and caravan purchase details. Record count not disclosed. Coded data_total omitted (no defensible count).

Employee count: Southern Design RV is a small family caravan dealership in Ballarat, Victoria with a handful of named staff; coded 11 to 100.

Confidence Medium: only one primary source (Cyber Daily), victim has not confirmed the incident, no record count, incident date unknown.

event_chain.summary: CMD Organization gains initial access to Southern Design RV systems by unknown method
Customer data exfiltrated including names, addresses, emails, phone numbers, and purchase records
CMD Organization lists victim on leak site and auctions stolen data for 5 bitcoin

summary: Southern Design RV, a caravan and RV dealer in Ballarat, Victoria, Australia, was listed as a victim by the CMD Organization cybercrime group, which claimed to have exfiltrated customer data including names, addresses, emails, phone numbers, and purchase details. CMD Organization set up a public auction for the stolen data starting at 5 bitcoin. Southern Design RV declined to comment when contacted. The incident date is unknown; the listing appeared on 2026-06-20.
